tasks.name: Ground Height
tasks.description: Rank targets by ground height. Answer format: a sequence of option indices, e.g. 3 4 1 2.

tasks.name: Ground Angle
tasks.description: Rank targets by angle w.r.t. ground. Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Dimension
tasks.description: Rank targets by size (e.g., length/diameter). Answer format: option indices, e.g. 2 1 4 3.

tasks.name: Relative Distance
tasks.description: Rank targets by relative distance (pairwise). Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Area
tasks.description: Rank targets by area (group-level). Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Volume
tasks.description: Rank targets by volume (group-level). Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Multi-View (Geo.)
tasks.description: Rank targets by geometric property using multiple views. Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Hop Distance
tasks.description: Rank pairs by shortest topological distance (hops). Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Cycle Length
tasks.description: Rank candidates by cycle length. Answer format: option indices.

tasks.name: Multi-View (Topo.)
tasks.description: Rank targets by topological property using multiple views. Answer format: option indices.
